result.summary: Google Workspace Reseller API is the only public integration surface found on reseller.googleapis.com: HTTP REST at https://reseller.googleapis.com/reseller/v1, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 user credentials.

google_oauth_user.label: Google OAuth access token for Workspace/Channel APIs
google_oauth_user.setup: Create a Google Cloud project, enable the relevant Google Workspace Reseller / Cloud Channel API, and configure OAuth consent in the [Google Cloud console](https://console.cloud.google.com/). Then run an OAuth flow for a Google account that has the needed reseller/partner permissions and grant the required Workspace/Channel scopes for the API you call.
